title: 2026-05-01 / WoA，隐忍
content:
桥曾话我“谁叫你用 cc，用 opencode 谢谢。cc 给非自家模型加上了随机空格和随机字段来干扰缓存”，因此我尝试安装 OpenCode，结果一执行 opencode 就卡住。

搜了半天，在一个 closed issue 下发现了原因：

Bun doesn’t fully support arm64 on windows yet. That’s why the TUI doesn’t work. FFI is entirely disabled so I created the issue in their repo

Windows on ARM 什么时候才能崛起啊！？！？！
